philosophy.section.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.section.subtitle: Harmony of Body & Nature
philosophy.section.body:
At An Binh, we believe that true wellness comes from the balance between the internal elements of the body and the external rhythms of nature.

Drawing from thousands of years of traditional wisdom, our approach combines time-honored herbal remedies with modern understanding to restore your body's natural capacity for healing.
philosophy.herbs.title: Premium Herbal Selection
philosophy.herbs.subtitle: Curated for Potency
philosophy.herbs.body:
Every formulation begins with the careful selection of premium herbs. We prioritize ingredients that are ethically sourced and harvested at peak maturity to ensure maximum therapeutic value.

Experience the difference that quality makes in your journey to wellness.
bento.title:
Explore our key therapies
and traditional remedies
faq.q1.question: What types of conditions can Traditional Medicine treat?
faq.q1.answer: Traditional Medicine is effective for a wide range of conditions, including chronic pain, digestive issues, stress-related disorders, insomnia, and hormonal imbalances. We take a holistic approach to address the root cause of your symptoms.
faq.q2.question: Is acupuncture painful?
faq.q2.answer: Most patients experience little to no pain. The needles are extremely thin—about the width of a hair. You may feel a slight prick or a dull ache, which is actually a good sign that the energy (Qi) is being activated.
faq.q3.question: How long does a consultation usually take?
faq.q3.answer: An initial consultation typically lasts 60-90 minutes. This allows our practitioners to conduct a thorough pulse diagnosis, understand your medical history, and create a personalized treatment plan.
faq.q4.question: Are the herbal remedies safe to take with my other medications?
faq.q4.answer: Your safety is our priority. During your consultation, we review all medications you are currently taking to ensure there are no interactions. Our herbal formulas are crafted from high-quality, ethically sourced ingredients.
faq.q5.question: Are the pre-decocted herbal formulas as high quality as self-brewed ones?
faq.q5.answer: Yes, even better. The closed-pressure decoction system at An Binh extracts maximum active ingredients that manual brewing can lose to evaporation. Medicines are vacuum-sealed in sterile bags, preserving full potency and flavor. extremely convenient for busy people while ensuring consistent dosage.
carousel.title: Our Natural Collections
reviews.body: Real healing, real stories. Hear how traditional medicine has restored balance to our patients' lives through our holistic treatments.
reviews.col1.0.name: Minh T.
reviews.col1.0.text: I was skeptical about traditional medicine, but the acupuncture treatments here completely reset my sleep cycle. I feel years younger.
reviews.col1.1.name: Sarah J.
reviews.col1.1.text: The atmosphere is so calming. An Binh is a hidden gem in Winnipeg for anyone looking for holistic care.
reviews.col1.2.name: David L.
reviews.col1.2.text: The herbal tea blends are not only delicious but actually effective. My digestion has never been better.
reviews.col2.0.name: Emily R.
reviews.col2.0.text: Finally found relief for my shoulder pain after months of struggling. The staff is incredibly professional.
reviews.col2.1.name: James K.
reviews.col2.1.text: A sanctuary of peace. The treatments helped me manage my work stress significantly.
reviews.col2.2.name: Linh N.
reviews.col2.2.text: I love the personalized approach. They really take the time to understand your body's needs.

about.hero.title: About Us
about.hero.desc: The most popular and trusted traditional medicine clinic in the city.
about.bento.label: ☆ ABOUT US
about.bento.title: The Highest Level of Comfort, Healing and Service
about.bento.desc: At An Binh Clinic, we combine premium traditional medicine with attention to detail. Whether it's a private therapy session tailored just for you, or a relaxing herbal remedy routine — we take care of everything, so you can enjoy every moment.
about.tabs.why.label: ✦ Why Choose Us
about.tabs.why.title: Rooted in Tradition, Perfected for Modern Healing.
about.tabs.why.f1.title: Master Herbalists
about.tabs.why.f1.desc: Decades of classical training — every diagnosis is rooted in time-proven protocols.
about.tabs.why.f2.title: Personalised Care
about.tabs.why.f2.desc: Every plan is built for you — targeting your body's unique needs.
about.tabs.why.f3.title: Premium Ingredients
about.tabs.why.f3.desc: 80+ varieties sourced from certified highland farms, prepared using traditional methods.
about.tabs.why.f4.title: Holistic Approach
about.tabs.why.f4.desc: We treat the root, not just the symptom — balancing body, mind, and energy.
about.tabs.journey.label: ● Our Journey
about.tabs.journey.title: Over 30 years of healing, guided by ancestral wisdom and modern care.
about.tabs.journey.desc: An Binh was founded in the early 1990s by Dr. Nguyen Phuoc Binh, a renowned physician trained in classical Eastern medicine. What began as a modest family clinic grew — generation by generation — into one of the city's most trusted institutions for holistic care.
about.tabs.vision.label: ● Our vision
about.tabs.vision.title: A future where traditional medicine is accessible to every family, at every stage of life.
about.tabs.vision.desc: We envision An Binh as more than a clinic — a living bridge between ancient healing knowledge and the needs of modern life. By combining classical diagnostics with contemporary wellness practices, we strive to make holistic care not just effective, but truly welcoming.
about.tabs.mission.label: ● Our mission
about.tabs.mission.title: To honour the wisdom of traditional medicine while serving each patient with empathy, precision, and care.
about.tabs.mission.desc: Our mission is grounded in three principles: personalised care that sees the whole person, ethical sourcing of every herb and remedy, and a deep commitment to education — sharing the knowledge of Eastern medicine with each patient and the wider community.
about.services.label: ♥ SERVICES
about.services.title: What we offer?
about.services.desc: From a private diagnosis to a scheduled multi-month healing route to an accessible wellness check — we've got the perfect option for you.
about.services.panel.private.label: ⚚ AS YOU WISH
about.services.panel.private.title:
Tailored Private Therapies
and treatments
about.services.panel.private.desc: Enjoy a personalized healing journey in our VIP relaxing rooms. These sessions offer complete flexibility — targeting exactly your pain points or energy blocks at your own pace.
about.services.panel.private.highlight:
Perfect for those seeking a
custom wellness experience.
about.services.panel.scheduled.label: ⚚ STRUCTURED CARE
about.services.panel.scheduled.title:
Structured
healing programmes
about.services.panel.scheduled.desc: Our multi-session treatment plans are designed for conditions that require sustained, progressive care. Each follow-up builds on the last — measurable improvement, every step.
about.services.panel.scheduled.highlight:
Ideal for chronic conditions
and long-term recovery.
about.services.panel.herbal.label: ⚚ FROM THE SOURCE
about.services.panel.herbal.title:
Handcrafted
herbal prescriptions
about.services.panel.herbal.desc: Every herbal blend is prescribed and prepared on-site by our herbalists using over 80 premium varieties sourced from certified highland farms — dried, processed, and dispensed with care.
about.services.panel.herbal.highlight:
80+ premium herb varieties,
sourced and prepared in-house.
about.services.panel.acupuncture.label: ⚚ ANCIENT PRECISION
about.services.panel.acupuncture.title:
Acupuncture
and acupressure therapy
about.services.panel.acupuncture.desc: Practiced for over 2,000 years, our acupuncture and acupressure treatments restore the body's natural energy flow — relieving pain, reducing stress, and supporting deep healing from within.
about.services.panel.acupuncture.highlig:
Trusted by millions across
Asia for over two millennia.
about.services.panel.nutrition.label: ⚚ WHOLE-BODY CARE
about.services.panel.nutrition.title:
Nutrition
and physical therapy
about.services.panel.nutrition.desc: We take a whole-body approach — combining Eastern dietary therapy with targeted physical rehabilitation. Our specialists guide you through corrective exercises and restorative nutrition plans.
about.services.panel.nutrition.highlight:
Combining Eastern diet theory
with modern physiotherapy.
about.services.panel.community.label: ⚚ TOGETHER WE HEAL
about.services.panel.community.title:
Community
health support
about.services.panel.community.desc: We believe healing should be accessible to all. Through subsidised consultations, community workshops, and outreach programmes, we bring traditional medicine care to those who need it most.
about.services.panel.community.highlight:
Free workshops every month
for the local community.
about.cta.title: Ready to Begin Your Healing Journey?
about.cta.desc: Experience the perfect balance of traditional wisdom and modern care at An Binh Clinic.

ingredients.hero.desc: Every herb, every root, every blossom — ethically sourced from pristine highland gardens and trusted traditional farms.

ingredients.hero.corner.stat1.label: Herb Varieties
ingredients.hero.corner.stat2.label: Exclusive Traditional Medicines
ingredients.why.label: Our Promise
ingredients.why.title:
Why Our Ingredients
Stand Apart
ingredients.why.desc: We work directly with highland farmers and traditional cultivators to bring you herbs harvested at peak potency, dried and processed using centuries-old methods.
ingredients.cards.c1.title: Dried Herbs
ingredients.cards.c1.desc: Sun-dried at optimal harvest time to preserve active compounds and maximum therapeutic value for your healing formulas.
ingredients.cards.c2.title: Medicinal Roots
ingredients.cards.c2.desc: Ginseng, astragalus, and licorice root — cornerstone tonics of Eastern medicine, sourced with decades of trusted partnerships.
ingredients.cards.c3.title: Herbal Blends
ingredients.cards.c3.desc: Carefully balanced multi-herb formulas following classical prescriptions, refined by generations of traditional practitioners.
ingredients.editorial.statement: We provide premium herbs with a personal touch.
ingredients.editorial.body1: Our collection spans over 80 varieties of dried herbs, medicinal roots, and blended formulas — each chosen by our master herbalists from trusted highland farms across Vietnam.
ingredients.editorial.body2: To ensure consistency and potency, all batches are tested before entering our dispensary. We process using sun-drying and traditional methods that preserve the full therapeutic profile of every herb.
ingredients.editorial.quote: "At An Binh, inclusivity of care is at the heart of what we do. We believe healing should be accessible and personalised for everyone."
ingredients.editorial.body3: Our herbalists aren't just dispensers — they are traditional medicine specialists who prioritise your wellbeing and recovery. Beyond sourcing, they guide each patient toward the right formula for their specific needs.
ingredients.editorial.body4: Whether you are managing a chronic condition or seeking preventive care, our team crafts personalised herbal protocols grounded in classical Eastern medicine traditions.
ingredients.bento.s1.title: Exclusive Traditional Formulas
ingredients.bento.s1.desc: Time-tested prescriptions refined across generations, targeting the root causes of chronic conditions.
ingredients.bento.s2.title: Herb Varieties Sourced
ingredients.bento.s2.desc: From highland ginseng roots to coastal sea herbs — our range covers the full spectrum of Eastern medicine philosophy.
ingredients.cta.label: ✦ An Binh Traditional Medicine
ingredients.cta.title: We make every remedy a harmonious blend of nature and wisdom. Start your healing journey with An Binh — book now!
